description: Implement the cover system where walls, objects, and destructible furniture provide half or full cover to entities behind them, reducing incoming hit chance. Destructible cover can be broken by attacks.
acceptance_criteria: Given an entity is positioned behind a wall or tall object relative to the attacker, when the attacker fires, then the hit chance is reduced by the cover value (50% for half cover, 75% for full cover).
Cover is determined by checking tiles between attacker and target for blocking objects.
Destructible cover objects (crates, consoles, barricades) have HP and can be destroyed by attacks.
When destructible cover is destroyed, it is replaced with a rubble/debris tile that provides no cover.
A visual indicator shows when the player or a targeted enemy has cover (e.g., shield icon or color tint on the tile).
Both the player and enemies benefit from cover — AI entities will seek cover positions.
notes: Spec: 'Objects and walls provide half/full cover, reducing hit chance. Destructible cover adds tactical depth.' Cover is determined by LOS ray intersecting cover-tagged tiles.
